introSection:
Miner Mike is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently in storage at Niagara Amusement Park and Splash World in Grand Island, New York, USA. It was previously located at Knucklehead's Bowling & Family Entertainment in Wisconsin Dells, Wisconsin, USA, opening with the park in March 2007.

The roller coaster closed in 2023 and was purchased by IB Parks & Entertainment, who sent the ride to Niagara Amusement Park and Splash World, where it was assembled in 2023. It has since been taken down.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 14 riders.

fullText:
Miner Mike is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently in storage at Niagara Amusement Park and Splash World in Grand Island, New York, USA. It was previously located at Knucklehead's Bowling & Family Entertainment in Wisconsin Dells, Wisconsin, USA, opening with the park in March 2007.

The roller coaster closed in 2023 and was purchased by IB Parks & Entertainment, who sent the ride to Niagara Amusement Park and Splash World, where it was assembled in 2023. It has since been taken down.



Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 14 riders.
